news_items.headline: Wall Street analysts view NVDA as undervalued with median target price of $267.50, implying 24% upside potential
LS Securities raised SK Hynix price target from 1.5M won to 2.1M won on strong April DRAM contract prices
Samsung Electronics estimated Q2 2026 operating profit at 80.9 trillion won, up 1630% YoY, driven by AI chip demand
Broadcom stock rallied 4.3% on reports of potential $35-55 billion financing from Apollo and Blackstone for AI buildout
Kakao Corp achieved record Q4 2025 revenue of 2.13 trillion won with ChatGPT for Kakao reaching 8 million users
SOL Korea High Dividend ETF assets exceeded 5 trillion won with monthly dividend of approximately 6% annualized yield
